description_long: This is a grand, classical-style public fountain with a square stone base and four ornate columns supporting a decorative, domed roof. The structure features a central basin with a rounded front, flanked by two smaller basins on either side, all integrated into the main pedestal. The roof is adorned with sculpted details and finials, and the columns are topped with decorative capitals. The stonework is finely crafted, with carved reliefs and moldings visible on the base and around the basins. The fountain is elevated on a multi-tiered plinth, giving it a prominent presence suitable for a plaza or park. The overall design suggests a historical or commemorative function, blending both utility and ornamental artistry.
description: A grand, classical stone fountain with four columns, ornate domed roof, and multiple basins, set on a tiered square base. Richly decorated with sculpted details and reliefs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main rounded basin, central pedestal, and two side basins, with all four columns and the ornate roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the right side basin and the detailed column capitals, with the central basin still prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the fountain, with the side basins visible but the main front basin less pronounced.
description_view_3: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but from the other side, showing the main basin and symmetrical architectural features.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features classical decorative motifs, including sculpted reliefs on the base, ornate capitals on the columns, and a domed roof with finials and carved moldings. The overall style is reminiscent of neoclassical or Victorian public monuments.
attribute_basin_structure: The main basin is rounded and projects from the central pedestal, with two smaller side basins integrated into the structure. The basins have defined rims and are set within a multi-tiered stone plinth.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the current state of the fountain.
